name: Ice Cream Cone Cupcakes
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine the first four ingredients according to the cake mix package directions. Fill each cone with about 2 1/2 tablespoons of batter. Place the cones about three inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes. Cool completely. For the icing, beat all ingredients together in a large bowl until smooth. Ice each cupcake with about one tablespoon of icing. Before the icing hardens, decorate with candy and/or sprinkles. Store in an airtight container.
